name: caas-qa-audit-runner
description: Playwright + tooling for the AI-driven QA audit workflow. Isolated from the main CaaS package.json so adding/upgrading Playwright doesn't touch the React build.

scripts.test:backtest: node --test code-search.test.mjs apply-qa-overlay.test.mjs qa-browser-bridge.test.mjs qa-target.test.mjs contracts/contracts.test.mjs scenario-config.test.mjs feature-backtest-batch.test.mjs observation-view.test.mjs renderability.test.mjs llm-json.test.mjs skip-challenge.test.mjs plan-discrimination.test.mjs
